questions.speaker: Rishi
questions.a: Plants give us food, fresh air, and fun!

questions.speaker: Ayra
questions.a: Farmers grow the food we eat every day!

questions.speaker: Rishi
questions.a: Seeds sleep in the soil until they wake up!

questions.speaker: Ayra
questions.a: Plants drink water through their roots!

questions.speaker: Rishi
questions.a: Plants eat sunshine and soil food!

questions.speaker: Ayra
questions.q: Why do we wait for plants?
questions.a: Good things take time — just like us!

questions.speaker: Rishi
questions.a: Deep roots, more tomatoes! Grow big!

questions.speaker: Rishi
questions.a: Slow sprouting? Totally normal! Be patient.

questions.speaker: Ayra
questions.a: Methi gives you two harvests from one seed!

questions.speaker: Rishi
questions.q: How do we thin a cup?
questions.a: Snip the weaker sprout. Never pull!

questions.speaker: Ayra
questions.q: How much sun do plants need?
questions.a: Four to six hours of sun daily!
